message.content:
@startuml
!theme plain

class "java" {
  <<interface>>
  +initialize()
}

class "Controllers" {
  "ClassController" {
    - oblist : ObservableList<Class>
    - col_delete : TableColumn<Class, Button>
    - col_edit : TableColumn<Class, Button>
    - col_add : TableColumn<Class, Button>
    - col_name : TableColumn<Class, String>
    - col_class : TableColumn<Class, String>
    - col_teacher : TableColumn<Class, String>
    - col_updateBtn : TableColumn<Class, Button>
    - col_viewBtn : TableColumn<Class, Button>
    + initialize()
    + addClass()
    + refresh()
    + home()
  }
  "DashboardController" {
    - oblist : ObservableList<Attendance>
    - stlist : ObservableList<StudentList>
    - col_attend : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
    - col_attendee : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
    - col_class : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
    - col_student : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
    - col_indivName : TableColumn<StudentList, String>
    - col_studentName : TableColumn<StudentList, String>
    - col_teacher : TableColumn<StudentList, String>
    - col_updateBtn : TableColumn<StudentList, Button>
    - col_viewBtn : TableColumn<StudentList, Button>
    - hourCount : Label
    - stCount : Label
    - table : TableView<Attendance>
    - table1 : TableView<StudentList>
    + initialize()
    + update()
    + home()
  }
  "HomeController" {
    - oblist : ObservableList<Class>
    - classes : ComboBox<String>
    - dashboard : Button
    - initialize()
    + initialize()
    + update()
    + home()
  }
  "LoginController" {
    - pf_pass : PasswordField
    - tf_email : TextField
    - initialize()
    + login()
  }
  "OptionsController" {
    - oblist : ObservableList<Class>
    - col_delete : TableColumn<Class, Button>
    - col_edit : TableColumn<Class, Button>
    - col_add : TableColumn<Class, Button>
    - col_name : TableColumn<Class, String>
    - col_class : TableColumn<Class, String>
    - col_teacher : TableColumn<Class, String>
    - col_updateBtn : TableColumn<Class, Button>
    - col_viewBtn : TableColumn<Class, Button>
    - table : TableView<Class>
    + initialize()
    + addClass()
    + home()
  }
  "RegisterController" {
    - pf_confirm : PasswordField
    - pf_pass : PasswordField
    - tf_email : TextField
    - tf_firstname : TextField
    - tf_lastname : TextField
    + initialize()
    + register()
  }
  "StudentsController" {
    - oblist : ObservableList<Class>
    - col_delete : TableColumn<Student, Button>
    - col_edit : TableColumn<Student, Button>
    - col_add : TableColumn<Student, Button>
    - col_firstname : TableColumn<Student, String>
    - col_lastname : TableColumn<Student, String>
    - col_class : TableColumn<Student, String>
    - col_teacher : TableColumn<Student, String>
    - col_updateBtn : TableColumn<Student, Button>
    - col_viewBtn : TableColumn<Student, Button>
    - table : TableView<Student>
    + initialize()
    + addNewStudent()
    + home()
  }
  "TimetableController" {
    - oblist : ObservableList<Timetable>
    - col_no : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
    - col_hour : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
    - col_day : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
    - col_start : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
    - col_end : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
    - col_week : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
    - col_year : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
    - col_year1 : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
    - col_year2 : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
    - col_year3 : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
    - col_year4 : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
    - col_year5 : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
    - col_year6 : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
    - col_year7 : TableColumn<Timetable, String>

    - col_year14 : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
